Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.episteme.core.util.identity

Uses of Package
org.episteme.core.util.identity

Packages that use org.episteme.core.util.identity
Package
Description
org.episteme.core.bibliography
 
org.episteme.core.methodology
Core functionality for the org.episteme.core.methodology package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.core.util.identity
 
org.episteme.natural.biology
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.cell
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.ecology
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.evolution
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience
 
org.episteme.natural.biology.taxonomy
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry.biochemistry
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry.elements
 
org.episteme.natural.chemistry.spectroscopy
 
org.episteme.natural.earth
 
org.episteme.natural.medicine
Provides the org.episteme.social.medicine module.
org.episteme.natural.methodology.experiment
Core functionality for the org.episteme.core.methodology.experiment package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.natural.physics
Covers:
org.episteme.natural.physics.astronomy
 
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.
org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic
Provides models and simulation engines for urban traffic flow analysis.
org.episteme.social.arts
- artworks, music, literature classification.
org.episteme.social.arts.music
- musical notes, instruments, compositions.
org.episteme.social.arts.theater
- plays, performances, dramatic arts.
org.episteme.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.episteme.social.economics.models
 
org.episteme.social.economics.money
Provides classes for monetary and financial operations.
org.episteme.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.history
- historical events, timelines, and chronology.
org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.
org.episteme.social.law
Provides the org.episteme.social.law module.
org.episteme.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.
org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.
org.episteme.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml.core
Provides the
invalid reference 
org.episteme.social.ml.tigerxml.core
module.
org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation
Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.medicine.consultation package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.social.philosophy
Provides support for philosophy, including formal logic, ethics, epistemology, and storytelling.
org.episteme.social.philosophy.epistemology
Provides classes for modeling epistemology, the study of knowledge and justified belief.
org.episteme.social.philosophy.storytelling
Provides the org.episteme.social.philosophy.storytelling module.
org.episteme.social.politics
Provides the org.episteme.social.politics module.
org.episteme.social.psychology.social
Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology.social module.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
org.episteme.social.sociology.survey
Core functionality for the org.episteme.social.sociology.survey package in the Episteme library.
org.episteme.social.sports
Provides classes and interfaces for sports science, athletic performance analysis, and competition modeling.
  • Classes in org.episteme.core.util.identity used by org.episteme.core.bibliography
    Class
    Description
    Identification
    Base class for all identification schemes.
    Identified
    Represents an entity that can be uniquely identified.

    Description
    ComprehensiveIdentification
    An encompassing interface that groups identification, naming, commenting, and serialization.

    Base class for all identification schemes.
    Identified
    Represents an entity that can be uniquely identified.
